app.name: gh-slimify
app.one_liner: Automatically detect and migrate GitHub Actions workflows to `ubuntu-slim` for cost-efficient CI.

screens.name: Workflow Migration Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display analysis results of GitHub Actions workflows and allow user to review and confirm migration to ubuntu-slim.

rust_commands.name: migrate_job
rust_commands.purpose: Apply ubuntu-slim migration to a specific job in a workflow file.

rust_commands.name: scan_workflows
rust_commands.purpose: Parse and analyze GitHub Actions workflow files to determine eligibility for ubuntu-slim migration.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add support for applying safe migrations to workflow files
week 1: Build CLI command to scan and report migration candidates
week 1: Implement workflow parsing and ubuntu-slim eligibility logic
acceptance_tests: Running the tool from repository root successfully scans all .github/workflows/*.yml files and outputs JSON when --json flag is used.
Tool correctly identifies jobs using service containers and marks them ineligible for ubuntu-slim migration.
Tool detects privileged operations like 'mount' or 'iptables' in run steps and flags job as incompatible.
